ANGEL HAS WRITTEN A TOTAL OF 80 LETTERS. MOST OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO LARGE ENVELOPES AND THE REMAINING 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. TO FIND HOW MANY LARGE ENVELOPES ANGEL USED, WE DIVIDE THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS BY THE NUMBER OF LETTERS PER LARGE ENVELOPE. 

ANGEL USED 80 LETTERS IN TOTAL. SHE PUT 2 LETTERS IN EACH LARGE ENVELOPE. TO FIND HOW MANY LARGE ENVELOPES SHE USED, WE DIVIDE 80 BY 2. 

ANGEL USED 40 LARGE ENVELOPES.
